scripts.dev: docker-compose up -d && concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,green --kill-others-on-fail "pnpm dev:api" "pnpm dev:web"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter api build && pnpm --filter web build && pnpm --filter extension build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter api typecheck && pnpm --filter extension typecheck
